words.word: run the mower over the lawn
the plants are looking a bit dry
it could do with some rain
the garden's a bit of a jungle
I've got a bit of gardening to do
spend the arvo in the yard
the tomatoes are ready to pick
chuck a snag on the barbie
have a barbie out the back
the kids are out the back
the possums got into the garden
